Legal

Legal notice

This page explains the legal information that applies to the use of rotata.es and its published content.

Contact Rotata Privacy policy
01

Contexte

Introduction

This legal notice governs the use of the public site, its content, links and general legal framework.

02

Modèle opératoire

Company identification

The site is published under the responsibility of the following entity.

01

Company: Rotata Consulting SL

02

Website: rotata.es

03

Email: info@rotata.com

04

Phone: +34 649 49 82 72

03

Contexte

Activity description

The site presents Rotata’s B2B system design, implementation, consulting and editorial content related to CRM, data, workflows and revenue operations.

04

Modèle opératoire

Terms of use

Use of the site should remain lawful and respectful of the published service and other users.

01

Do not misuse forms or scripts

02

Do not attempt to disrupt or compromise the service

03

Do not reproduce content in a misleading way

04

Respect the rights of Rotata, partners and third parties

05

Modèle opératoire

Intellectual property

Site content remains protected by intellectual property and related rights.

01

Original copy and design belong to Rotata or are used with permission

02

Partner names and logos belong to their respective owners

03

Reuse requires authorization unless law permits otherwise

04

Quotations should remain limited and properly attributed

06

Modèle opératoire

Liability limitation

Rotata works to keep the site accurate and available, but some limits remain necessary.

01

Information may change over time

02

Uninterrupted availability is not guaranteed

03

Users remain responsible for how they act on published information

04

Third-party services can affect linked experiences

07

Contexte

External links

The site may link to third-party pages for context. Rotata does not control those external pages or their privacy practices once a user leaves rotata.es.

08

Modèle opératoire

Applicable law

Applicable law depends on the nature of the issue, but the site is operated from Spain.

01

Spanish law where applicable

02

Mandatory data protection and consumer rules where required

03

European data protection rules for in-scope processing

04

Other mandatory local rules where law requires it

09

Contexte

Jurisdiction

Disputes are submitted to the competent courts determined by applicable law and, where allowed, to the courts of Rotata’s registered office in Spain.

10

Modèle opératoire

Contact

Legal or compliance questions may be directed through the published contact routes.

01

Email: info@rotata.com

02

Contact route: /contact/

03

Privacy route: /legal/privacy/

04

Other legal pages remain publicly available on the site

Use contact for a legal question

Consulter

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
